title: Mystacidium infundibulare

intro: Mystacidium infundibulare, also known as the "tongue orchid," is a species of terrestrial orchid native to tropical Africa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various health benefits, including its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and pneumonia. The bioactive constituents of Mystacidium infundibulare include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic compounds, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
